keyboardHint: Use ← → arrow keys to navigate, Esc to skip
welcomeDesc:
LeanPilot is your all-in-one Lean Manufacturing platform.
It helps you monitor production, solve problems, and drive continuous improvement — all in one place.

Let's take a quick tour of the main tools.
dmaicDesc:
LeanPilot is organized around the DMAIC framework — the backbone of Lean Six Sigma:

• Define — Set up your production lines, products, and orders
• Measure — Track OEE, quality, and hourly output
• Analyze — Find root causes with 5 Why, Ishikawa, and Gemba walks
• Improve — Drive change with Kaizen, SMED, and TPM
• Control — Sustain gains with 6S audits and quality policies
assessmentDesc:
Start here! The Lean Assessment evaluates your factory across 6 key areas and generates a personalized improvement roadmap.

Answer 18 questions to discover your Lean maturity level and get prioritized recommendations.
productionOrdersDesc:
Create and manage production orders with full traceability.
Track planned vs. actual quantities, monitor order status from draft to completed, and link orders to your Bill of Materials.
productionInputDesc:
Log daily production data for each line: run time, planned time, total pieces, good pieces, and defects.

LeanPilot automatically calculates your OEE (Availability × Performance × Quality) from this data.
oeeDashboardDesc:
Your command center for production performance.
View real-time OEE with availability, performance, and quality breakdowns.

Interactive charts show trends over time, helping you spot patterns and prioritize improvements.
hourlyDesc:
Track production output hour by hour against targets.
Quickly identify when and where production falls behind, so supervisors can take immediate corrective action.
qcChecksDesc:
Perform standardized quality inspections at critical points in your process.
Record measurements, pass/fail results, and attach photos.

QC checks integrate with NCR and CAPA workflows for full traceability.
fiveWhyDesc:
When problems occur, ask "Why?" five times to drill down to the root cause.

LeanPilot guides you through each level, linking causes to effects, so you fix the real problem — not just the symptom.
ishikawaDesc:
Visually map all potential causes of a problem across the 6M categories:
Man, Machine, Method, Material, Measurement, and Mother Nature.

A powerful brainstorming tool for cross-functional teams.
kaizenDesc:
Capture and track improvement ideas from anyone in the factory.
Kanban-style board with To Do, Doing, and Done columns.

Assign owners, set due dates, and celebrate completed improvements.
smedDesc:
Reduce changeover times with the Single-Minute Exchange of Dies methodology.
Document each step, classify as internal or external, and track your improvement progress over time.
tpmDesc:
Total Productive Maintenance helps you prevent breakdowns before they happen.
Track equipment health, schedule preventive maintenance, and monitor MTBF and MTTR metrics.
sixSDesc:
Conduct standardized workplace audits across Sort, Set in Order, Shine, Standardize, Sustain, and Safety.
30 questions scored 0-5, with trend tracking to measure improvement over time.
copilotDesc:
Your AI-powered manufacturing assistant.
Ask questions about Lean methodology, get help interpreting your OEE data, or brainstorm improvement ideas.

The Copilot understands your factory context and speaks your language.
finishDesc:
You now know the main tools in LeanPilot.

Start with the Lean Assessment to discover your improvement priorities, then explore each tool at your own pace.

You can always replay this tutorial from Settings.
